known_gaps: External guideline artifacts are not cached or license-verified.
Clinical and safety review is incomplete.
Simulation set is below release coverage requirements.

history.malignancy.wording: 현재 또는 과거에 암을 진단받은 적이 있나요?

history.recent_head_trauma.wording: 최근 3개월 안에 머리를 다치거나 강하게 부딪힌 적이 있나요?

medication.acute_headache_days_per_month.wording: 진통제나 편두통 급성 약을 한 달에 며칠 정도 사용하나요?

pain.frequency.wording: [필수] 최근 평가 대상 기간 동안 통증은 얼마나 자주 있었나요? 1 통증 없음, 2 통증이 있으나 매일은 아님, 3 매일 통증이 있음

pain.nrs_score.wording: [필수] 현재 통증을 0부터 10까지 숫자로 알려주세요. 0은 통증이 전혀 없음, 10은 상상할 수 있는 가장 심한 통증입니다.

patient.immunocompromised.wording: 면역을 낮추는 약을 복용 중이거나 면역이 약해지는 질환·치료를 받고 있나요?

symptom.altered_consciousness_or_cogniti.wording: 두통과 함께 심하게 졸리거나 깨우기 어렵거나 혼란, 기억·행동·성격의 뚜렷한 변화가 있나요?

symptom.aura_sensory.wording: 두통 전후로 저림이나 감각 둔화가 서서히 생겼다가 5~60분 안에 완전히 회복되나요?

symptom.aura_speech.wording: 두통 전후로 말이 잘 나오지 않는 증상이 서서히 생겼다가 5~60분 안에 완전히 회복되나요?

symptom.aura_visual.wording: 두통 전후로 번쩍이는 빛, 점이나 선, 시야 일부가 안 보이는 증상이 5~60분 정도 나타났다가 완전히 회복되나요?

symptom.headache.activity_aggravation.wording: 걷거나 계단을 오르는 일상 활동으로 두통이 심해지거나 활동을 피하게 되나요?

symptom.headache.cough_or_valsalva_trigg.wording: 기침, 재채기 또는 힘주기를 할 때 두통이 시작되거나 뚜렷이 심해지나요?

symptom.headache.exercise_trigger.wording: 운동이나 격한 활동을 할 때 두통이 시작되나요?

symptom.headache.frequency_days_per_mont.wording: 한 달에 두통이 있는 날은 대략 며칠인가요?

symptom.headache.location.wording: 머리의 어느 부위가 아픈가요? 한쪽인지 양쪽인지도 알려주세요.

symptom.headache.maximum_within_5_minute.wording: 두통이 시작된 뒤 5분 안에 가장 심한 정도에 도달했나요?

symptom.headache.postural.wording: 앉거나 서거나 누울 때처럼 자세가 바뀌면 두통이 뚜렷하게 달라지나요?

symptom.headache.quality.wording: 통증은 욱신거림, 누르는 느낌, 조임, 찌름, 화끈거림 중 무엇에 가깝나요?

symptom.headache.severity.wording: 두통은 가벼움, 중간 정도, 매우 심함 중 어디에 가깝나요?

symptom.headache.worsening.wording: 두통이 점점 심해지거나 이전과 비교해 양상이 크게 달라졌나요?

symptom.light_sensitivity.wording: 두통이 있을 때 빛이 유난히 불편한가요?

symptom.nausea_or_vomiting.wording: 두통과 함께 메스껍거나 토한 적이 있나요?

symptom.neurological_deficit.wording: 두통과 함께 새로 한쪽 힘이 빠짐, 지속되는 감각 이상, 말하기 어려움, 균형 이상 또는 겹쳐 보임이 있나요?

symptom.painful_red_eye.wording: 두통이 있는 쪽 눈이 빨갛고 아픈가요?

symptom.sound_sensitivity.wording: 두통이 있을 때 소리가 유난히 불편한가요?

symptom.unexplained_vomiting.wording: 장염이나 음식 문제 등 뚜렷한 이유 없이 구토가 반복되나요?

symptom.visual_disturbance.wording: 시야가 흐리거나 겹쳐 보이거나 무지개 테두리가 보이거나 시력이 떨어졌나요?

elements.limitation: Clinical sex used for interview routing is not automatically equivalent to every USCDI sex-related element.

elements.data_element: Medication, Dose, Dose Unit, Indication and Dispense Status
Blood Pressure, Heart Rate, Respiratory Rate, Temperature and Pulse Oximetry
Laboratory Test, Result, Result Status and Specimen
Clinical Test and Result or Report
Patient Goals and Care Experience Preference

Medication, Laboratory, Imaging and Clinical Test Orders
History and Physical or Progress Note

limitations: Coverage indicates candidate data-population capability, not US certification or conformance.
A mapped Fact does not make the data element clinically required for this encounter.
US-specific vocabularies and regulatory semantics do not replace Korean bindings or policy.

Pain presence and NRS score when pain applies

nodes.display: Headache Triggered by Cough or Valsalva

nodes.wording: [필수] 최근 평가 대상 기간 동안 통증은 얼마나 자주 있었나요? 1 통증 없음, 2 통증이 있으나 매일은 아님, 3 매일 통증이 있음
[필수] 현재 통증을 0부터 10까지 숫자로 알려주세요. 0은 통증이 전혀 없음, 10은 상상할 수 있는 가장 심한 통증입니다.

guideline_behavior.rationale: Interview behavior derived from guidelines may change with recommendations.

local_jurisdiction.rationale: Local pathways and administrative rules may change quickly.

safety_critical.rationale: Safety behavior and escalation knowledge require frequent monitoring.

stable_semantic.rationale: Atomic patient-reportable concepts are relatively stable but still require periodic review.

terminology_mapping.rationale: Terminology and interoperability baselines have independent releases.

clinical_guideline.rationale: Daily automated monitoring provides early detection for high-impact guideline changes; full review occurs only when change is detected or the review date is reached.

interoperability_standard.rationale: Versioned interoperability standards and domain datasets are monitored weekly; detected changes trigger mapping and Coverage review without changing clinical rules.

nice_guidance.rationale: NICE guidance is versioned and may be amended; weekly monitoring detects changes without implying weekly clinical re-review.

public_health_guidance.rationale: Public-health pages can change between formal releases; weekly monitoring is appropriate for the research package.

terminology_server.rationale: Terminology servers publish versioned content; monthly baseline monitoring balances stability and acquisition cost.

assertions: Further evaluation or referral should be considered for worsening headache with fever, sudden headache reaching maximum intensity within five minutes, new neurological or cognitive deficit, personality change, impaired consciousness, recent head trauma, cough or exertion trigger, postural headache, giant cell arteritis features, painful red eye or substantial pattern change.
New headache with compromised immunity, relevant malignancy history or otherwise unexplained vomiting requires further evaluation consideration.
Characterization includes frequency, duration, severity, associated symptoms, medicines, triggers, activity impact and menstrual relationship.

Primary headache-associated features can include pulsation, activity aggravation, light or sound sensitivity, nausea or vomiting, reversible aura and unilateral autonomic eye or nasal symptoms; questionnaire patterns do not establish a diagnosis.
artifacts.title: Headaches in over 12s: diagnosis and management

assertions: Fever, headache, neck stiffness and altered consciousness or cognition form a red flag combination for bacterial meningitis.
Meningitis may still be suspected without every component and suspected cases require emergency hospital transfer.
The interview escalates the combination without assigning meningitis.
artifacts.title: Meningitis (bacterial) and meningococcal disease: recognition, diagnosis and management

assertions: A sudden extremely painful headache, headache after serious head injury, or headache with weakness, speech or memory problems, vision loss, confusion or marked drowsiness requires emergency assessment.
Severe headache with jaw pain when eating, blurred or double vision, sore scalp, limb numbness or weakness may require urgent assessment.
artifacts.title: Headaches — emergency and urgent advice

assertions: STOM lookup confirmed active SNOMED CT 25064002 Headache (finding), including Korean designations 두통 and 머리 통증.
Finding site and Severity were present as allowed MRCM attributes.
MRCM validates terminology modeling only and does not determine clinical questions, priority, diagnosis or safety.
artifacts.title: STOM SNOMED CT lookup and MRCM allowed attributes for headache
